---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a capability to add or remove
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## The Sculpting Question

Before proposing a feature, ask yourself:

**Is this something to ADD, or is the current design over-carved and needs something REVEALED?**

## What do you want?

A clear description of the feature.

## Why does the sculpture need this?

How does this serve the sculptor (user)? What problem does it solve?

## Which component does this affect?

- [ ] The Chisel (sculpting conversation UI)
- [ ] The Workshop (runtime proxy)
- [ ] The Sculpture Spec (schema/format)
- [ ] The X-Ray (capability visualization)
- [ ] Rock Dust (audit/logging)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Could this be achieved by REMOVING something instead?

Sometimes the best feature is a removal. Have you considered a subtractive approach?
